case_number: Criminal Bail Application is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Application No.S-126 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of bail application 16-05-2019 Mr. Abdul Hafeez Mirani, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, D.P.G.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length states that he would be satisfied and shall not press this Criminal Bail Application if direction is given to the trial Court to hear the application filed on behalf of the applicant under section 265-K, Cr.P.C on the next date of hearing viz.28.05.2019 and decide the same expeditiously. Learned D.P.G records his no objection. Accordingly, this Criminal Bail Application is dismissed as not pressed; however the learned trial Court is directed to hear the application of applicant under section 265-K, Cr.P.C preferably on the next date of hearing and decide the matter within 30 days. In case the applicant’s application is dismissed by the trial Court, he shall be liberty to repeat bail application before the trial Court. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
